hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty' | grep -qE '(^|/)data/' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"The data/ directory is read-only — it contains user-provided files. Save your generated files to data_ai/ instead."}}' || true
